Tim, drove past your south fence line yesterday. Those corner posts by the creek are worse than I thought. Half of em are rotting at the base. Calvin's $2,400 quote was for replacing the wire and the bad posts on the east run, but if those corner posts go you're looking at a much bigger job. Might want to get a second look before you sign anything. Just looking out for you.
